summary: Business travel lodging (差旅住宿) and training lodging (培训住宿) are governed by two separate policy documents with distinct standard tables that explicitly cannot be mixed. Each policy contains a mutual exclusion clause: the travel policy (04) defers to the training policy during training periods, and the training policy (05) prohibits mixing with travel standards. The standard structures differ fundamentally — travel standards vary by both rank (4 tiers) and city tier (3 tiers), while training standards vary only by city tier (3 tiers) with no rank differentiation. The 2025 reimbursement umbrella policy (01) applies to both expense types and in Article 12 caps reimbursement at 1.0x the applicable standard without special approval.

key_findings.detail: Travel lodging standards (04_travel_expense.md, Article 4) are defined by a matrix of 4 employee ranks (员工级/经理级/部门负责人级/高管级) x 3 city tiers (一类/二类/三类), producing 12 distinct rate cells ranging from 300 to 1100 RMB/person/night.

Training lodging standards (05_training_expense.md, Article 5) are defined by city tier only (3 tiers), with no rank differentiation, producing 3 distinct rate cells ranging from 350 to 500 RMB/person/night.

Article 7 of the travel policy explicitly states: '培训期间住宿不适用本办法住宿表,应按《XX证券培训费管理办法》执行' (During training periods, lodging does not apply this method's lodging table; the Training Expense Management Method shall be followed instead).

Article 6 of the training policy explicitly states: '培训住宿标准仅适用于培训期间住宿,不得与差旅住宿标准混用' (Training lodging standards only apply to training-period lodging and must not be mixed with travel lodging standards).

For Tier 1 cities: travel lodging for staff-level employees (450) is BELOW the training lodging rate (500), while travel lodging for manager-level and above (650-1100) is ABOVE the training rate. For Tier 2 cities: travel staff (380) is below training (420), while travel manager+ (550-900) is above. For Tier 3 cities: travel staff (300) is below training (350), while travel manager+ (450-750) is above. This means a staff-level employee on business trip would get a LOWER lodging rate than the same employee attending training in the same city — and conversely, a manager or above on business trip would get a HIGHER rate than during training.

The 2025 reimbursement policy (01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md) covers both travel and training expenses (Article 2). Article 12 prohibits reimbursement exceeding 1.0x the applicable system standard without special approval — this cap applies to whichever standard (travel or training) governs the specific expense.

The 2022 reimbursement policy (02_expense_reimbursement_2022_deprecated.md) is fully repealed as of 2025-01-01 and has no bearing on current lodging standard applicability. Its only preserved content (old approval thresholds) has been superseded.

Three independent reasons: (1) STRUCTURAL INCOMPATIBILITY — travel standards are rank-graded, training standards are flat by city tier, so there is no one-to-one mapping that would allow mixing; (2) EXPLICIT PROHIBITION — both policies contain express mutual exclusion clauses (04 Article 7, 05 Article 6); (3) DIFFERENT REGULATORY PURPOSE — travel lodging covers general business trips where rank-based accommodation is expected, while training lodging applies to organized training events where egalitarian accommodation is the norm. An employee cannot select whichever standard is more favorable by characterizing the same stay under a different policy.

applicable_policies.title: XX证券差旅费管理办法
applicable_policies.role: Travel lodging standard table; Article 7 redirects training-period lodging to training policy

applicable_policies.title: XX证券培训费管理办法
applicable_policies.role: Training lodging standard table; Article 6 prohibits mixing with travel standards

applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)
applicable_policies.role: Umbrella reimbursement policy; Article 12 caps at 1.0x standard; Article 14 repeals 2022 version

applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
applicable_policies.role: Historical archive only; no current applicability

mutual_exclusion_clauses.text: 培训期间住宿不适用本办法住宿表,应按《XX证券培训费管理办法》执行。
mutual_exclusion_clauses.effect: During training periods, the travel lodging table does NOT apply; the training policy governs instead.

mutual_exclusion_clauses.text: 培训住宿标准仅适用于培训期间住宿,不得与差旅住宿标准混用。
mutual_exclusion_clauses.effect: Training lodging standards ONLY apply to training-period lodging and MUST NOT be mixed with travel lodging standards.

citations: 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md, Article 14 (effective date and repeal of 2022 version)
